name: Challenger Limited
analysis: CGF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.6200. Trade idea: entry A$9.7150, stop A$8.7021, target A$12.7537 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
